query: SpaceX Falcon 9 launches May 2026 count total year to date
answer:
## SpaceX Falcon 9 Launches — 2026 Year-to-Date (through May 20, 2026)

### Summary

SpaceX has completed **58 Falcon family launches** in 2026 through May 20 — comprising **57 Falcon 9** and **1 Falcon Heavy** mission. All 58 launches were successful with no failures. This pace is roughly comparable to 2025's record-setting cadence (59 through the same date) and ahead of 2024's pace (51 through May 20).

---

### Monthly Breakdown

| Month | Launches |
|---|---|
| January | 13 |
| February | 12 |
| March | 15 |
| April | 12 |
| May (1–20) | 6 |
| **Total YTD** | **58** |

---

### Year-over-Year Comparison

| Year | YTD (through ~May 20) | Full-Year Total |
|---|---|---|
| 2023 | N/A | 96 |
| 2024 | ~51 | 134 |
| 2025 | ~59 | 163 |
| 2026 | **58** | Projected ~148–152 |

SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell stated in a March 2026 *Time* interview that SpaceX expects "maybe 140, 145-ish" Falcon 9 launches in 2026 — a slight step-down from 2025's record of 163, likely reflecting increasing Starship operations absorbing some mission demand.

---

### Notable 2026 Milestones

1. **100th Falcon booster ground pad landing** — F9-583 (Jan 3), CSG-3 mission
2. **New pad turnaround record** — F9-588 (Jan 14), just 45 hours between launches from same pad
3. **First booster to fly 33 missions** — F9-604 (Feb 22), Starlink Group 6-104
4. **First operational landing in The Bahamas** — F9-602 (Feb 20)
5. **First booster to fly 34 missions** — F9-622 (Mar 30), new reuse record
6. **600th successful Falcon booster landing** — F9-629 (Apr 19)
7. **12th Falcon Heavy launch** — FH-012 (Apr 29), ViaSat-3 F3

---

### Payload Mix

The vast majority of launches remain **Starlink constellation deployments**. Notable non-Starlink missions include:
- **2 GPS III satellites** (GPS III-9, GPS III-10) for US Space Force
- **2 NRO/Starshield missions** (NROL-105, NROL-172)
- **1 crew mission** (Crew-12 to ISS)
- **2 ISS cargo missions** (CRS-34, Cygnus NG-24)
- **1 Italian Earth observation satellite** (CSG-3)
- **2 communications satellites** (EchoStar XXV, ViaSat-3 F3)
- **3 rideshare missions** (Transporter-16 with 119 payloads, Twilight/Pandora with 39, South Korean EO + 44 payloads)

---

**Source:** Wikipedia, "List of Falcon 9 and Falcon Heavy launches (2026)" — accessed May 20, 2026.

key_facts: SpaceX has completed 58 Falcon family launches in 2026 YTD (through May 20): 57 Falcon 9 + 1 Falcon Heavy.
All 58 launches were successful — no failures in 2026.
Monthly breakdown: January 13, February 12, March 15, April 12, May (1-20) 6.
2026 YTD pace (58) is comparable to 2025 (59 through same date) and ahead of 2024 (51 through same date).
SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell projected 'maybe 140, 145-ish' Falcon 9 launches for full-year 2026 in a March 2026 Time interview.
2025 set the annual record with 163 Falcon launches; 2024 had 134; 2023 had 96.
Current 2026 pace projects to approximately 148-152 launches for the full year.
A Falcon 9 booster set a new reuse record of 34 flights on March 30, 2026 (F9-622).
SpaceX achieved its 600th successful Falcon booster landing on April 19, 2026 (F9-629).
A new pad turnaround record of 45 hours was set on January 14, 2026 (F9-588).
The vast majority of 2026 launches are Starlink constellation deployments.
